name: travelog-planner
description: Free Obsidian and Notion travel planning tools built on a Travelog-compatible schema.
author: ChuppeWorks

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @travelog/schema build && pnpm --filter @travelog/interchange build && pnpm --filter travelog-obsidian build
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm validate:notion && pnpm validate:release
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @travelog/schema typecheck && pnpm --filter @travelog/interchange typecheck && pnpm --filter travelog-obsidian typecheck
